title: Init skeleton: herdctl Cargo crate + web npm package, compiling stubs, one passing test each, record verify
action: Bootstrap greenfield project per plan.md S0 and decision 4e3ef1a1 (single binary crate herdctl, module-per-concern; web/ separate npm vite+xterm.js package). Create Cargo.toml (edition 2021) with compiling src/main.rs + src/lib.rs declaring stub modules (config, security, herdr, supervisor, watcher, store, web). Create web/ npm package (vite + typescript + @xterm/xterm) with a compiling src/main.ts stub. Add one trivial passing test each side. Record commands.verify in .bee/config.json. Stubs only, no feature logic.
verify: cargo test --quiet && cd web && npm run -s build && npm run -s test -- --run
